CustomField.formula:
IF(Pricing_Matrix__r.Location_Based_Product_Discount__c != 0, Pricing_Matrix__r.Location_Based_Product_Discount__c,
IF( Pricing_Matrix__r.Customer_Based_Product_Discount__c!= 0, Pricing_Matrix__r.Customer_Based_Product_Discount__c,
IF( Pricing_Matrix__r.Location_Based_Product_Sub_Cat_Discount__c != 0, Pricing_Matrix__r.Location_Based_Product_Sub_Cat_Discount__c,
IF( Pricing_Matrix__r.Customer_Based_Product_Sub_Cat_Discount__c != 0, Pricing_Matrix__r.Customer_Based_Product_Sub_Cat_Discount__c ,
IF( Pricing_Matrix__r.Location_Based_Product_Category_Discount__c != 0, Pricing_Matrix__r.Location_Based_Product_Category_Discount__c,
IF( Pricing_Matrix__r.Customer_Based_Product_Category_Discount__c != 0, Pricing_Matrix__r.Customer_Based_Product_Category_Discount__c, SBQQ__Discount__c ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Discount Formula
